summary: Browser overview now renders the already-computed priority_attention and recent_activity fields with concise operator-visible context and one-level-deeper detail controls while preserving existing JSON and live-update contracts.

Added focused no-spend browser HTML/JS reference tests for priority attention and recent activity overview rendering.
Committed and pushed the repair branch.
